name: ptondereau/phigue
description: Layered configuration hydrated into a typed object through reflection

suggest.psr/cache: Cache the reflection plan (PSR-6) to skip introspection on every run
suggest.psr/simple-cache: Cache the reflection plan (PSR-16) to skip introspection on every run
suggest.psr/log: Pass a PSR-3 logger to Layered::cache() to record cache backend failures
